_publications._publicationTitle: Neuregulin-1 beta and neuregulin-1 alpha differentially affect the migration and invasion of malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumor cells.

_contextSnippet: 10 nM NRG-1β being required for maximal migration of STS-26T cells
details: NRG-1β at 10 nM was required for maximal migration enhancement, with statistically significant increases observed
